cards.title: Social Media Ban Improved Parent-Child Relationships
cards.body: A psychotherapist shares how limiting phone usage transformed her mood and family dynamics. Strict boundaries with social media created happier children and calmer parenting.

cards.title: Parenthood Makes Your Brain Younger, Studies Show
cards.body: Recent research reveals mothers and fathers develop healthier, younger-looking brains despite parenting's demands. The mental and emotional gymnastics of raising children appear to have cognitive benefits.

cards.title: Guide Adolescent Girls Through Toxic Digital Culture
cards.body: Parents and teens often struggle navigating today's digital challenges together. Expert strategies can help safely guide adolescent girls to thrive online.

cards.title: Being Too Permissive Undermines Child Security
cards.body: Permissiveness isn't always kind—clear, negotiated limits build genuine security in relationships. Children thrive with boundaries that foster understanding and trust.

cards.title: Kids Losing Cursive—Does It Actually Matter?
cards.body: Many children no longer learn or value cursive handwriting as a skill. The loss raises questions about what competencies we prioritize in education.
